title: Fun words from your letters
description: Cheerful little words built from the letters you know
text: we go slow our dog is here she likes a fair ride

tips.text: Fun little words using only the letters you know
You can read what you type now!

character_tips.anna: Look — you can read your own words now! "our dog" 🌷
character_tips.maxim: Real phrases from real letters. Memory loves meaning.
character_tips.knopych: WORD POWER! 🎉 You can read what you type!
character_tips.klavochka: Your very own little words, my treasure 💖
